title: KitsX Custom
description: KitsX Custom is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets players create and edit custom PvP kits directly in‑game. Includes a simple command system, live editing sessions, and fast kit cancellation. kit customization without heavy menus or dependencies.
body:
KitsX Custom is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets players create and edit custom PvP kits directly in-game.

Designed for KitPvP and practice servers, it provides a simple command system for fast kit editing and cancellation without heavy menus or dependencies.

Commands:
/customkit — open the custom kit editor
/kitcancel — cancel your editing session

Built for: Paper 1.21.11
Author: ManWork
License: ARR (closed-source)

KitsX Custom is lightweight, fast, and easy to use — perfect for servers that want simple, player-friendly kit customization.


INFORMATION
The Newest versions of Customkit will now be rebranded into a staff core over the years of creating this the ManWorks team and I thought to change this plugin to a more standered staff core plugin that can block any sort of vpn usage, plugin see or using bukkit commands and having a whole ranking and pvp system if theres errors go to the community discord server to report if anything bugs if it does our team will fix the bug and make it so its betteer or if you have ideas to add go to the COMMUNITY-IDEAS section and give an idea for the plugin The plugin has over 1000 code has a banning system and dosnt require anything you can just download and play by the way in the plugin edit the part were it says full staff permission override and set you're minecraft player name to it so its YOUR MINECRAFT PLAYER NAME - FULL STAFF PERMISSION OVERRIDE then if theres a coding line that says private boolean isPLAYERNAMEOrStaff(CommandSender sender) { if (sender instanceof Player p) { if (isYOUR PLAYER NAME(p)) return true; // YOUR PLAYER NAME ALWAYS allowed return isStaff(p); // normal staff logic } return true; // console always allowed } } this code makes it so you can always be in staff mode or be given GOD which is owner rank for the staff permisions you will be able to bypass looking at plugins and can see players regions if you want any more information about this plugin join our discord also if you still want a customkit menu where players can make there own custom kits were still making in code to have a staff core and a queue making system then sends players through proxy servers and can make customkits in creative without having NBT items or any illegal items Thank you.

-From The ManWorks Team
